title: The Triumph of the Rat
writer: Constance Collier, Graham Cutts, Reginald Fogwell
actors: Ivor Novello, Isabel Jeans, Nina Vanna
plot: The rise of The Rat, an Apache, from seedy Montmartre bars to the gentleman status of Pierre Boucheron, and his fall to lower than an Apache--all by the hands of a beautiful girl he did not love.
